ogTitle: Wallumbilla vs Wallumbilla South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wallumbilla and Wallumbilla South.
heading: Wallumbilla vs Wallumbilla South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wallumbilla, Queensland and Wallumbilla South, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wallumbilla South has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Wallumbilla (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wallumbilla or Wallumbilla South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wallumbilla has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Wallumbilla South scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wallumbilla scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Wallumbilla South scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wallumbilla or Wallumbilla South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wallumbilla South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
